reconciliation.requested_label_count: integer; number of supplied country labels
reconciliation.matched_iso3_count: integer; number reconciled to one stable ISO3 identifier
reconciliation.portal_alias_match_count: integer; supplied labels matched through a non-canonical portal label

applied_scale_corrections.ordering: ascending by year, then ISO3, then indicator_id

unresolved_scale_anomalies.ordering: ascending by ISO3, then year, then indicator_id

revision_quality_audit.excluded_anomaly_iso3: list of unique uppercase ISO3 strings in ascending order

matrix_audit.eligible_country_count: integer; countries entering the 2023 PCA matrix after anomaly exclusions

pca.pc1_variance_fraction: number rounded to 4 decimals; fraction, not percent
pca.pc1_absolute_loading_order: list containing all nine indicator IDs from largest to smallest absolute PC1 loading

clusters.sizes_by_ascending_burden: list of four integers; position 1 is the lowest mean PC1 cluster and position 4 is the highest
clusters.high_burden_iso3: list of uppercase ISO3 strings in ascending order

panel_model.other_countries_annual_slope: number rounded to 4 decimals; years of life expectancy per calendar year
panel_model.high_burden_by_year_interaction: number rounded to 4 decimals; years per calendar year
panel_model.high_burden_annual_slope: number rounded to 4 decimals; years per calendar year
